title: HVAC site spec → solution (UI)
prompt: From HVAC site spec: chiller plant, three floor zones, comfort dashboard, high-temperature alert. Generate and verify in Explorer, Operator, and Alarms.
uiJourney: AI Studio generator → Explorer → Operator → Alarms
humanSteps: Paste site spec into AI Studio solution generator.
Accept chiller, floor zones, comfort dashboard, alert.
Verify in Explorer; open Operator comfort; confirm Alarms has high-temp rule.
